events.fact: Character 'Conrad' created.
World 'Terra Conrad' generated.
Valkyrie delivers character to the Meadows biome.
Discovered runestone marking the location of the first boss, Eikthyr.
Crafted a wooden Club.
First combat encounter: Killed a Boar and collected leather scraps.
Killed a Neck and collected meat.
Discovery of Flint along the water's edge.
Crafted a Stone Axe.
Located Eikthyr's sacrificial altar.
Discovered Birch trees, noting they require better tools to harvest.
Killed a Greyling and collected resin.
Crafted a Hammer.
Built a Workbench.
Discovered an abandoned structure containing a beehive.
Built a Campfire.
Constructed first wooden shelter including walls and flooring.
Built and claimed a Bed.
Completed the shelter roof to meet 'sheltered' requirements.
Set spawn point at the bed.
Slept through the first night to avoid nighttime enemy spawns.
Obtained Rested buff with Comfort level 4.
